title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail Capital India:
Future Retail Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail Capital India!
